queries.natural_language_goal: Recover EKIN contact snippet containing the email address.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?snippet WHERE { ex:Empresa_EKIN_S_Coop ex:textoExtracto ?snippet . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?snippet)), 'email:')) } LIMIT 5

queries.natural_language_goal: Recover the replacement-part policy text attached to the replacement part node.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?snippet WHERE { ex:PiezaRecambio_1 ex:textoExtracto ?snippet . } LIMIT 5

queries.natural_language_goal: Find the safety instruction snippet that mentions the EKIN customer-support department.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?instruction ?text WHERE { ?instruction ex:textoExtracto ?text . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?text)), 'departamento de asistencia al cliente de ekin')) } LIMIT 10

queries.natural_language_goal: Inspect the bounded descriptive snippet attached to the machine/manual pair.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?p ?o WHERE { ex:Maquina_A218_RASHEM_7x3000x500 ?p ?o . FILTER(?p IN (ex:label, ex:textoExtracto)) } LIMIT 10

queries.natural_language_goal: Get the safety-element verification requirement as a bounded attribute snippet.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?snippet WHERE { ex:ElementoSeguridad_1 ex:textoExtracto ?snippet . } LIMIT 5

queries.natural_language_goal: Traverse from the machine node to the directive linked by explicit compliance.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?directive ?identifier WHERE { ex:MaquinaBrochadoExterior_18 ex:cumpleNormativa ?directive . OPTIONAL { ?directive ex:identificador ?identifier . } } LIMIT 10

queries.natural_language_goal: Traverse from the machine safety system to the maintenance plan it requires.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?plan ?label ?text WHERE { ex:SistemaSeguridadMaquina ex:requiereMantenimiento ?plan . OPTIONAL { ?plan rdfs:label ?label . } OPTIONAL { ?plan ex:textoExtracto ?text . } } LIMIT 10

queries.natural_language_goal: Read the bounded text attached to the precaution concept.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?snippet WHERE { ex:Precaucion ex:textoExtracto ?snippet . } LIMIT 5

queries.natural_language_goal: Recover the figure attached to the manual and its descriptive snippet.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?figure ?text WHERE { ?figure ex:ilustradoEn ex:ManualBrochadoraA218 . OPTIONAL { ?figure ex:textoExtracto ?text . } FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?figure)), 'figura0-1-1') || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?text)), '0-1-1')) } LIMIT 10

queries.natural_language_goal: Recover the linear rules controlled by CarroPortaPiezas_46.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?rule ?text WHERE { ex:CarroPortaPiezas_46 ex:controla ?rule . OPTIONAL { ?rule ex:textoExtracto ?text . } } LIMIT 10

queries.natural_language_goal: Traverse Columna_46 -> component -> controlled rule -> rule text.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://vocab.cfaa.eus/broaching/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?carrier ?rule ?text WHERE { ex:Columna_46 ex:tieneComponente ?carrier . ?carrier ex:controla ?rule . OPTIONAL { ?rule ex:textoExtracto ?text . } } LIMIT 20
